nasb.text: It happened year after year, as often as she went up to the house of the Lord, she would provoke her; so she wept and would not eat.

esv.text: So it went on year by year. As often as she went up to the house of the Lord, she used to provoke her. Therefore Hannah wept and would not eat.

cnv.text: 年年都是這樣；每逢她上耶和華殿的時候，毘尼拿總是刺激哈拿，使她哭泣，吃不下飯。

ccb.text: 每年来到耶和华的殿时，毗尼娜总是惹她伤心哭泣，以致她吃不下饭。
